title: You Must Be This Conservative To Ride: The Inside Story of Postmedia's Right Turn
notes: Canadaland investigation into Postmedia's editorial transformation. Confirms 2015 directive: during the 2015 federal election the Ottawa Citizen was ordered by Postmedia bosses to endorse the Conservative Party. Also documents the 2019 centralisation under Kevin Libin as 'executive editor of Postmedia politics.' Based on interviews with 30+ current and former employees. Published August 2019; corrections August 12 and 14, 2019.
